# VA Web Components Vendor Assets

These files are vendored from `@department-of-veterans-affairs/web-components@24.3.0`.

Source tarball:
https://registry.npmjs.org/@department-of-veterans-affairs/web-components/-/web-components-24.3.0.tgz

The app loads `component-library.css`, `component-library.esm.js`, and the
`nomodule` fallback directly from this directory so the FastAPI MVP can use the
official VA Design System web components without a Node build step.
